title: Really Simple Origins
description: Ever wanted simple origins that are not too complicated? Well this is the mod/datapack for you
body:
_**Hold on guys, lemme cook, gonna release a better version Trust**_





If you ever wanted simple origins that dont change the way you play the game in a huge way with pros and cons, then this is the mod for you. While other origins have downsides that change how you play with them like when you cant go in the sun without a helmet or needs to live in water.

These ones that i made have 1 or more abilities and nothing else. They are made to use for fun and not supposed to change the way you play the game in a huge way. You can still do all the normal things you would do in Vanilla minecraft. Normal or faster.

For now there are:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-**Teleport**
Ability to teleport where you look at for 120 blocks with a 4s cooldown. Or you can swap places with another entity with a 1-2s cooldown. The more you teleport the more you will get downsides. First weakness, slowness and then poison.

-**Mimic**
Can mimic Teleport, Triple Jump, speedster, Invisibility and poison. All of the abilitys are just a bit worse or older than the original.

-**Size Changer**
Can scale him self into being small/normal/big. Being small makes you faster but weaker, and being big makes you stronger but slower.

-**Wings**
Gets elytra and can boost him self without rockets. Flies 30% faster and can charge by shifting a flight jump that can launch up to 200 blocks in the air.

-**Triple Jump**
Has a easy to travers triple jump. Can use a dash while shifting for a far launch fowards.

-**Speedster (Speed Demon)**
Can go super fast with speed lv 5-40, can shift gears from 1-5 (5|10|20|30|40) and uses up meter slower or faster with what gear its using. Can run on water from gear 3 and up.

-**Invisibility**
Becomes fully invisible with armor. But can't hide whats holding in hands and can't use bow, crossbow, or end crystals.

-**Flight**
Grants creative flight for 30s max

-**Explode**
Wanted to roleplay as a creeper and rocket jump? Go on and explode.

-**Poison/Acid**
Can shoot a heavy poison attack that deals huge damage, big range and can shoot through walls. Or light poison attack that can be shot like a machine gun while crouching and holding the ability button

-**Lifesteal**
Killing players grants max 2 rows of hearts. Can use ability to take out 10hp for a strength and speed boost.

-**Craft**
Able to craft when ever and open a double chest as inventory that doesnt drop when dying. Has custom recipes to craft

-**Phase**
Can walk through walls and can't be hurt by projectiles

-**Farmer**
A real farmer with a custom horse and ability to bonemeal when ever you want

</details>



There are some that will get reworked and of course i will be adding new ones in the future
